$comment: scripts/PokemonFanClub.asm — the chairman's RAPIDASH ramble and the BIKE VOUCHER; a BICYCLE in the bag also ends the offer.

then.text:
Exchange that
VOUCHER for a
BICYCLE! My FEAROW will
FLY me anywhere,
so I don't need
one. Enjoy!

else.text:
I chair the
POKéMON Fan Club! I have collected
over 100 POKéMON! So... Did you come
to hear about my
POKéMON?

then.text:
Good! Then listen
up! My favorite
RAPIDASH... cute...
lovely... smart...
amazing... ...Oops! I kept
you too long! Thanks for hearing
me out! I want you
to have this!
